title: alopecurus arundinaceus var. ruthenicus
intro: Alopecurus arundinaceus var. ruthenicus is a type of plant, specifically a perennial grass, belonging to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and promoting digestion. Herbal preparations of Alopecurus arundinaceus var. ruthenicus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
